ingredients_text: BASTED PORK RIBS WITH ADDED WATER (85%) (PORK RIBS (88%), Water, Glucose Syrup, Salt, Modified Maize Starch, Stabilisers: Diphosphates, Triphosphates; Acidity Regulators: Sodium Citrates, Citric Acid; Yeast Extract), SMOKY BARBECUE FLAVOUR SAUCE IN SACHET (13%) (Water, Sugar, Onion Purée, Tomato Paste, Vinegar, Maize Starch, Molasses, Ground Chilli Pepper, Ground Cloves, Ground Cumin Seed, Garlic Powder, Dried Oregano, Salt, Smoke Flavouring, Burnt Sugar Syrup), BARBECUE FLAVOUR GLAZE (2%) (Sugar, Cornflour, Salt, Onion Powder, Tomato Powder, Garlic Powder, Ground Paprika, Ground Pepper, Ground Cayenne Pepper, Colour: Paprika Extract; Red Pepper Powder, Smoke Flavouring, Sunflower Oil).
